nl: Action-ability: For any feature i, if the user can take action on X_i, the attribution must explain how the action changes the prediction
nl_long: If the user can act on feature i (e.g., increase blood pressure medication), the attribution should explain the causal effect of the action. This makes the explanation actionable, not just descriptive.

anchors.evidence: 医生用归因决定行动(action), 归因应告诉医生 '调 X_i 会有什么效果'

anchors.concept: true belief 与 useful action 关联 (James, Dewey)

supporters: Counterfactual Explanations 论文 (Wachter et al. 2017)

process_meta.[AH-HA]: 用户希望 attribution 帮助行动, 不只是 'what' 而是 'what if I do'
process_meta.[HUNCH]: 跟 SC 互补 —— SC 关注 '什么是真', Action-ability 关注 '我能做什么'
